text:
Here are some feature ideas for the EcoTrack dashboard:

**Data & Analytics:**
- Historical trends (daily/weekly/monthly charts)
- Peak vs off-peak usage analysis
- Usage predictions based on patterns

**Device Management:**
- Device scheduling (auto on/off)
- Device control (turn devices on/off remotely)
- Standby power detection ("vampire power")

**Alerts & Budgeting:**
- Usage threshold alerts
- Monthly budget tracking with progress bars
- Cost alerts when exceeding limits

**Reports:**
- Export data to CSV/PDF
- Email weekly/monthly reports

**Integration:**
- Weather data correlation
- Solar panel/renewable energy tracking
- Smart home integration (Alexa, Google Home)

**User Experience:**
- Dark/Light mode toggle
- More detailed appliance insights
- Household comparison benchmarks

**Which of these interest you most?** Or do you have other ideas?
